title: Jarvis Development
description: Development cost, deploy history, Cloud Run runtime, and BHAGA pipeline execution health. Sources: jarvis_dev BigQuery (cost + deploys), bhaga BigQuery (pipeline coverage), and Google Cloud Monitoring (runtime).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd),2) AS `total` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost`
SELECT COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost`
SELECT ROUND(AVG(total_cost_usd),2) AS `avg` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost`

panels.title: Projected monthly run-rate
panels.description: Extrapolates this month's merged-PR cost to month-end.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(total_cost_usd) / EXTRACT(DAY FROM CURRENT_DATE()) * EXTRACT(DAY FROM LAST_DAY(CURRENT_DATE())), 2) AS projected FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost` WHERE PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%E*SZ', merged_at) >= TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), MONTH)

panels.title: Cost per PR — build vs review
panels.description: Per-merged-PR build cost (Cursor agent session) vs review cost (Claude Opus reviewer).

targets.rawSql: SELECT PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%E*SZ', merged_at) AS time, build_cost_usd AS `build`, review_cost_usd AS `review` FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost` ORDER BY merged_at

panels.title: Cost per PR — by model (stacked)
panels.description: Build cost per PR broken down by LLM model. Each model is a separate stacked area.

targets.rawSql: SELECT PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%E*SZ', p.merged_at) AS time, m.model, ROUND(SUM(m.cost_usd),4) AS cost FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.pr_cost_build_session` m JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.pr_cost_pr` p USING (pr_key) WHERE p.merged_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Spend by model (all time)
panels.description: Total cost (build + review) broken down by LLM model. Sorted by spend.

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd),2) AS cost FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_model_cost` GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost DESC

panels.title: Review churn — rework cost per PR
panels.description: Cost of review runs beyond the first (rework indicator).

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.pr_number, COUNT(*) AS review_runs, ROUND(SUM(r.cost_usd),2) AS review_cost, ROUND(SUM(IF(rn > 1, r.cost_usd, 0)),2) AS rework_cost FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pr_key ORDER BY ts) AS rn FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.pr_cost_review_run`) r JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.pr_cost_pr` p USING (pr_key) GROUP BY p.pr_number ORDER BY rework_cost DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT pr_number, title, ROUND(build_cost_usd,2) AS build_cost, ROUND(review_cost_usd,2) AS review_cost, review_runs, ROUND(total_cost_usd,2) AS total_cost, merged_at FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.vw_pr_cost` ORDER BY pr_number DESC
SELECT git_sha FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.deploys` WHERE unit = 'orchestrator' QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY unit ORDER BY ts DESC) = 1
SELECT git_sha FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.deploys` WHERE unit = 'webhook' QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY unit ORDER BY ts DESC) = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS deploys FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.deploys` WHERE ts >= TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), MONTH) AND kind = 'deploy'
SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(ts, WEEK) AS time, unit, COUNT(*) AS deploys FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.deploys` WHERE kind = 'deploy' GROUP BY time, unit ORDER BY time

SELECT FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', ts, 'America/Chicago') AS deployed_ct, agent, unit, LEFT(git_sha,12) AS sha, kind, actor, workflow_run_url FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.jarvis_dev.deploys` ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: MTD job vCPU-seconds (job free tier: 240k)
panels.description: Cloud Run Jobs billable_instance_time × 2 vCPU, month-to-date. Free tier: 240,000 vCPU-s/mo.

panels.title: MTD job GiB-seconds (job free tier: 450k)
panels.description: Cloud Run Jobs billable_instance_time × 4 GiB (post-W0 bump), month-to-date. Free tier: 450,000 GiB-s/mo.

panels.title: MTD webhook requests (free tier: 2M)
panels.description: Cloud Run Service request count month-to-date. Free tier: 2,000,000 requests/mo.

panels.title: Nightly job runtime (seconds/day)
panels.description: billable_instance_time per day — daily runtime proxy. Spikes indicate double-Chromium nights or slow ADP.

panels.title: Memory utilization p99 (bhaga-daily-refresh)
panels.description: Container memory/utilizations p99 — this chart would have shown the OOM creep on 2026-06-11.

panels.title: Pipeline last run date
panels.description: Most recent date with data in model_daily — confirms last successful nightly job.

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_MILLIS(TIMESTAMP(MAX(date))) AS time FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily`

panels.title: Days behind today
panels.description: Calendar days between last model_daily row and today. Green=0–1, yellow=2, red=3+.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), MAX(date), DAY) AS days_behind FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily`

panels.title: Successful runs (last 30 days)
panels.description: Number of days with model_daily data in the past 30 calendar days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT date) AS successful_runs FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily` WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

panels.title: Missed runs (last 30 days)
panels.description: Days with no model_daily entry in the past 30 calendar days. Green=0, yellow=1–2, red=3+.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 30 - COUNT(DISTINCT date) AS missed_runs FROM `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily` WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

panels.title: Daily run coverage (last 30 days)
panels.description: 1 = nightly job produced model_daily data for that date. 0 = gap (job failed, skipped, or date not yet processed). Jun 12 = today, expected 0 until tonight's run.

targets.rawSql: WITH calendar AS (SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY), INTERVAL n DAY) AS d FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(0,29)) AS n) SELECT TIMESTAMP(c.d) AS time, IF(m.date IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS ran FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily` m ON m.date = c.d ORDER BY c.d

panels.title: Recent coverage gaps
panels.description: Dates in the last 30 days where model_daily has no row (nightly job did not complete).

targets.rawSql: WITH calendar AS (SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY), INTERVAL n DAY) AS d FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(0,29)) AS n) SELECT c.d AS missing_date FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily` m ON m.date = c.d WHERE m.date IS NULL ORDER BY c.d DESC

panels.title: Last 30 days — run status
panels.description: Per-day pipeline execution status. MISSING = no model_daily row for that date.

targets.rawSql: WITH calendar AS (SELECT DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 29 DAY), INTERVAL n DAY) AS date FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_ARRAY(0,29)) AS n) SELECT c.date, IF(m.date IS NOT NULL, 'OK', 'MISSING') AS status, m.gross_sales, m.txn_count, ROUND(m.pool_per_hour,2) AS pool_per_hour FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN `jarvis-bhaga-prod.bhaga.model_daily` m ON m.date = c.date ORDER BY c.date DESC
